meaning: vt.封...死者为圣徒,使加入圣徒之列,褒扬,推崇
examples: Text served, additionally to canonize belief.
The thinkers after Lukacs, whether canonize or depreciate for totality method all showed the value of the theory and practice.
There's no god of minimalism poised to canonize you if you squeeze your list of possessions down to some arbitrarily decided number.
